About Us

Your Trusted Partner in Venezuela

We provide hands-on business advisory and operational support for foreign and local companies navigating Venezuela's regulatory environment. Our focus is practical execution, compliance, and reliable on-the-ground solutions. From market entry to ongoing operations, we coordinate every step with local authorities and partners.

🏛️

Local Expertise

Deep familiarity with Venezuelan regulations, authorities, and business culture.

🌐

International Standards

Professional, reliable, and confidential service that global companies expect.

⚙️

Practical Execution

Not just advice — we handle the process from start to finish.

"

Venezuela is complex. We make it manageable.

Our approach combines local knowledge with international professional standards — ensuring your business enters and operates with confidence.

On-the-ground

Local execution. International standards.

Why Choose VAS

Why Companies Choose Us

🏛️
01

Local Expertise with International Standards

We combine deep knowledge of Venezuela's regulatory landscape with international best practices. Our team ensures your operations meet both local requirements and global expectations.

🤝
02

Direct Coordination with Authorities

We liaise directly with government agencies, registries, and regulatory bodies on your behalf. This ensures faster processing and fewer obstacles in your business setup.

✅
03

Reliable Execution and Follow-Through

We manage every step from filing to approval, keeping you informed throughout. Our hands-on approach means nothing falls through the cracks.

🔒
04

Confidential and Professional Service

We handle all engagements with strict confidentiality and professionalism. Your business plans and operations remain secure with us.

Our Services

End-to-End Business Support in Venezuela

From initial setup to ongoing operations — we cover every aspect of doing business in Venezuela.

🏢

Market Entry & Company Setup

Company incorporation, commercial registry registration, Tax ID (RIF) processing, registration with tax and labor authorities, and support with local bank account opening.

📋

Permits & Regulatory Management

Municipal business licenses, industry-specific permits, sanitary registrations, renewals and compliance follow-up to keep your operations fully authorized.

⚖️

Legal Coordination

Corporate legal support, contract drafting and review, and labor law coordination through trusted partner firms.

📍

Local Representation & Back Office

Fiscal address services, local legal representative appointment, and official notification handling for your company in Venezuela.

🏠

Real Estate & Relocation Support

Office and commercial space search, warehouse and industrial facilities sourcing, and residential housing for executives relocating to Venezuela.

👥

Talent Search & Hiring Support

Local talent sourcing, executive search, and hiring coordination to build your team with qualified Venezuelan professionals.

📊

Investment Advisory for Existing Projects in Venezuela

Independent advisory services for capital deployment into active Venezuelan projects. We assist with due diligence, regulatory analysis, structuring, and local coordination to mitigate operational and compliance risks.

🔄

Ongoing Operations & Compliance Support

Post-incorporation support including regulatory follow-ups, renewals, local coordination, and ongoing advisory to ensure continuity and stability of operations.

Need a service not listed here? We handle bespoke requirements.

Discuss Your Needs

The Process

How It Works

A simple, structured approach to getting your business operational in Venezuela.

1

Initial Consultation

Contact us to discuss your business needs, timeline, and objectives for entering or operating in Venezuela.

2

Strategy & Planning

We assess regulatory requirements, identify necessary permits and registrations, and develop a tailored action plan for your operation.

3

Execution & Coordination

We handle filings, registrations, permits, and coordination with local authorities and partners on your behalf.

4

Ongoing Support

We provide continued compliance tracking, renewals, local representation, and operational support as your business grows.

Ready to Operate in Venezuela?

Contact us to discuss your business needs and learn how we can help you navigate Venezuela's regulatory environment with confidence.
